description: Configure the 'Pacifico' font as a Downloadable Font using Google Play Services (without bundling the font file) and create a text style named 'QuoteTextStyle' with a font family of @font/pacifico, a text size of 24sp, and a text color of #FF000000. Apply the 'QuoteTextStyle' to the TextView with the ID 'quote_text' in activity_main.xml.
